title: Summarize Research Paper Abstract with Key Findings
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize the abstract of a research paper. The target output should include the research paper's title, authors' names, main findings, and implications. The output should be in a formal tone and include relevant keywords. Limit the prompt to 120 words.
constraints: Must include the research paper's title and authors' names
Must have at least 3 main findings and their implications
Must be written in a formal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluate if the prompt correctly captures the research purpose
Assess if the main findings are accurate and relevant
Verify if the output is written in a formal tone
